title: SUNDAY SPECIAL
description: After over half a decade when he played the field with more mainstream subjects, Anurag Kashyap's new release, Kennedy, marks his return to exploring dark cinema.

title: EXCLUSIVE
description: Not every generation might be able to relate to Ansal Plaza or its existence. But that doesn't change the fact that it was Delhi's OG mall. But today, its condition is as good as a ghost town.
